what: Probe α (zero-LLM enumeration audit) — result + adversarial verification (run wyfd15i8b)

soundness_crosscheck.external: 12/12 k=3 survivors' decided exponents CONSISTENT with Khodier 2026 (Waterloo) Table 5.1 published critical exponents — independent confirmation Walnut is correct

two_slogans.LLM_bias_reachability (if-LLM-doesnt-nam: FALSIFIED — 36 sound, aperiodic, LLM-never-proposed decided-true theorems exist with the LLM confound removed
two_slogans.finitely_encodable_implies_textbook (the: NOT falsified — corroborated: the survivors are catalogued/published prior art

literature_check.k3_family_12of36: fully prior art — OEIS A189628 comment block enumerates the binary 3-uniform morphism->A-number family; Khodier 2026 thesis Table 5.1 IS this experiment (sequence + Walnut critical exponent)
literature_check.textbook_case: a36 0->001 1->110 = A064990 Mephisto Waltz, stated 4th-power-free in Allouche-Shallit, Automatic Sequences (Cambridge 2003) p.25
literature_check.probe_named_match_was_false_negative: the enumerator only knew Thue-Morse + period-doubling; OEIS shows all sampled survivors are named
literature_check.thin_sliver: k=2 ternary fixed points (A096271/A101614/A101664/A101671): SEQUENCE catalogued but specific power-free THEOREM sometimes unstated in OEIS (~2-3 distinct after symmetry) — marginal, exercise-class

shallow.why: min decided exponent 3-or-4 (none squarefree/overlap-free); design only decided integer e in {2,3,4} so it STRUCTURALLY cannot surface a critical-exponent surprise (e.g. Dejean threshold); 36/48=75% survival => power-freeness is generic over the tiny aperiodic space; only non-generic subclass (6 binary cube-free) is the most classical object in the field, symmetry-collapses to ~3

invariant4_discipline: pre-registered GREEN has 4 conjuncts (non-named, aperiodic, literature-check, HUMAN blind panel). (i)+(ii) met; (iii) now run informally => AGAINST novelty; (iv) human panel unrun. An agent may NOT stamp slogan-falsification — novelty is the human's call. The earlier interim 'structurally falsifies our slogan' OVERREACHED (conflated the two slogans).
verdict: PENDING-GREEN on the LLM-bias question (settled for α); effectively-RED on the textbook question (survivors are catalogued/published). The slogan's INTERESTING half survives.

disposition.autonomous_discovery: effectively concluded — 4 converging probes (genre A/B, Walnut run-3, SOS, zero-LLM enumeration); removing the LLM still yields catalogued/textbook
disposition.lever_if_any: search over EXTERNALLY-MEANINGFUL objects (Probe β: finite-witness record factory; novelty = objective public-table improvement) — as a SIDE-track under verification amplification, NOT the main track
disposition.critical_lesson: a literature/OEIS oracle must be a FIRST-CLASS AUTOMATED stage of any search track — the name-detector false-negatived 8/8; 'improves the table' is only credible with a real automated table-of-record lookup, never LLM-judged
disposition.forward_to_human_panel: at most the de-duplicated k=2 ternary theorem-level sliver (~2-3), and only after an automated OEIS filter is run + committed; do NOT forward the 12 k=3 (published) or 6 binary cube-free (textbook)
